name: engraving-processor-pro
description: Application for processing historical engravings and document scans

scripts.build: echo '🔧 Building Engraving Processor Pro...' && rm -rf dist .vite && vue-tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck && eslint . --max-warnings 0 --quiet && vite build && echo '✅ Build complete'
scripts.build:fast: echo '🚀 Fast build (skipping checks)...' && rm -rf dist .vite && vite build && echo '✅ Fast build complete'
scripts.start: echo '🚀 Starting Engraving Processor Pro (Preview Mode)...' && vite preview --host --port 4173 --open
scripts.serve: echo '🌐 Serving built application from dist/ on http://localhost:8080' && echo 'Open your browser to: http://localhost:8080' && cd dist && python3 -m http.server 8080
scripts.production: echo '🚀 Building and serving for production...' && pnpm build && pnpm serve
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:worker
scripts.check: npm run typecheck:all && npm run lint:quiet && npm run test

author: Ervins Strauhmanis
